name: Salary Processing Manager
description: Executes the monthly payroll cycle for all Carisma staff across 3 brands (80-110 headcount). Receives approved payroll data from CHRO, enters the payroll journal into Zoho Books, submits and pays FS5 (monthly tax deduction at source), and sends Dr. Walter payout calculations. Ensures payroll is posted before the 5th of the following month and FS5 is paid on time to avoid CFR penalties.
inputs: approved monthly payroll data from CHRO Payroll Manager
Dr. Walter contract terms for payout calculation
outputs: monthly payroll journal entry in Zoho Books
FS5 submission to Mr Mustafa for payment authorisation
monthly payroll cost breakdown by brand and location
variance note if payroll exceeds prior month by more than 5%

monthly: Receive and validate approved payroll from CHRO
Post payroll journal entry in Zoho Books
Prepare FS5 and submit to Mr Mustafa for payment
Confirm FS5 is paid for the previous month
Calculate and send Dr. Walter payout figures
Produce payroll cost summary for CFO

compliance-notes: FS5 must be paid monthly — late payment incurs CFR penalties
Payroll journal must match CHRO-approved figures exactly — no adjustments without written approval
